text: 69g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

on the plus side: context tells the real story. that is the whole point of misc. can still earn points as a better swap. the category should reward harm reduction when it is real. sometimes makes sense in a narrow use case. context matters more here than raw nutrient purity.

on the weaker side: basically a sugar spread. the fruit branding does not save it from the real composition. better replacements often exist. that practical comparison matters. not a whole-food nutrition star. most misc items are weak on raw nutrient profile.
D tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
